sentiment.reasoning: The launch of a new digital payments platform represents a strategic product expansion that could drive new revenue streams.

headlines.headline: Halven Investments secures $180M contract with a multinational manufacturer

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
